title: myroxylon coriaceum
intro: Myroxylon coriaceum, also known as the Andiroba tree, is a tropical plant native to the Amazon rainforest and other parts of Latin America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The extracts from the plant have shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and even exhibiting potential antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Myroxylon coriaceum include oil and resin, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and cosmetics, often applied topically to soothe skin conditions and wounds.
